mapper.sql: step_id, script_id, step_name, step_type, step_description, step_content, selector_info, input_schema, output_schema, param_mapping, step_order, is_required, is_active, enterprise_id, creator_id, create_time, update_by, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT s.step_id, s.script_id, s.step_name, s.step_type, s.step_description, s.step_content, s.selector_info, s.input_schema, s.output_schema, s.param_mapping, s.step_order, s.is_required, s.is_active, s.enterprise_id, s.creator_id, s.create_time, s.update_by, s.update_time, sc.script_name FROM datacloud_script_step s LEFT JOIN datacloud_script sc ON s.script_id = sc.script_id WHERE s.script_id = #{scriptId} AND s.enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId} ORDER BY s.step_order ASC

SELECT s.step_id, s.script_id, s.step_name, s.step_type, s.step_description, s.step_content, s.selector_info, s.input_schema, s.output_schema, s.param_mapping, s.step_order, s.is_required, s.is_active, s.enterprise_id, s.creator_id, s.create_time, s.update_by, s.update_time, sc.script_name FROM datacloud_script_step s LEFT JOIN datacloud_script sc ON s.script_id = sc.script_id WHERE s.script_id = #{scriptId} AND s.step_type = #{stepType} AND s.enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId} ORDER BY s.step_order ASC

SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_steps, COUNT(CASE WHEN is_active = 1 THEN 1 END) AS active_steps, COUNT(CASE WHEN is_active = 0 THEN 1 END) AS inactive_steps, COUNT(CASE WHEN is_required = 1 THEN 1 END) AS required_steps, COUNT(CASE WHEN is_required = 0 THEN 1 END) AS optional_steps FROM datacloud_script_step WHERE script_id = #{scriptId}
SELECT step_type, COUNT(*) AS count FROM datacloud_script_step WHERE script_id = #{scriptId} GROUP BY step_type ORDER BY count DESC
